subject: english
title: Unit 8 Project App — Present a Hobby
subtitle: Vocab Foundations + Be the Expert + Choose & Research + Write Report + Present & Rubric + Now I Can + Final Quiz. 8 modules.

content: Learn about geodes — beautiful rocks with crystals inside.
Choose a hobby, research it, and write a report.
Present the report and self-assess using a rubric.
Review Unit 8 goals with Now I Can checklist.
language: Use hobby vocabulary (collect, creative, enjoy, cooperate) in context.
Use academic words (analyze, sequence, definition, description, details) in project work.
Write and present a structured hobby report with details, how-to steps, and visuals.
